reply_original: Thank you for your 5-star rating! We're thrilled you're enjoying Fantasia. Your support fuels our passion to create more magical moments. If you ever need help, feel free to reach out to support@fantachat.ai. Keep exploring with your favorite characters!
reply_zh: 感谢您的五星评价！我们非常高兴您喜欢Fantasia。您的支持激励我们不断创造更多魔法般的时刻。如果您需要任何帮助，随时可以通过support@fantachat.ai联系我们。继续与您喜爱的角色一起探索吧！
